类 DocBaseTask

java.lang.Object
org.gradle.api.internal.AbstractTask
org.gradle.api.DefaultTask
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.gradle.task.DocBaseTask
所有已实现的接口:
Comparable<org.gradle.api.Task>, org.gradle.api.internal.DynamicObjectAware, org.gradle.api.internal.TaskInternal, org.gradle.api.Named, org.gradle.api.plugins.ExtensionAware, org.gradle.api.Task, org.gradle.util.Configurable<org.gradle.api.Task>
直接已知子类:
GrpcAdocTask, GrpcHtmlTask, GrpcMarkdownTask, JavadocAdocTask, JavadocHtmlTask, JavadocMarkdownTask, JMeterTask, OpenApiTask, PostmanTask, RestAdocTask, RestHtmlTask, RestMarkdownTask, RpcAdocTask, RpcHtmlTask, RpcMarkdownTask, SwaggerTask, TornaRestTask, TornaRpcTask, WebSocketAdocTask, WebSocketHtmlTask, WebSocketMarkdownTask, WordTask
@DisableCachingByDefault(because="Invokes external documentation generation and depends on project state; not cacheable yet.") public abstract class DocBaseTask extends org.gradle.api.DefaultTask
